name: Shield AI (Hivemind / EdgeOS)
summary: Shield AI builds Hivemind autonomy + EdgeOS middleware (closed proprietary); platforms include V-BAT, Nova 2, ViDAR, MQ-20, F-16. Public GitHub is mostly upstream forks.
killinchu_fit: Partnership/sub-vendor lane: Killinchu provides a governance + explainability + signed-evidence overlay for EdgeOS Pilot blocks. Killinchu senses + evidences; Hivemind flies. Two-person Yuyay gate for any own-fleet action.
hooks: EdgeOS Pilot block: Lambda-gated decision receipts
V-BAT/MQ-20 missions: signed Body-of-Evidence for after-action review
